name: Lisa Kandle
awards: Administrative Support Excellence Award, Efficiency Recognition
bio: Lisa supports project engineering and marketing operations with detail-oriented coordination that keeps communication clear and commitments visible. She helps translate internal progress into client-ready updates, reinforcing MH's relationship-first service standard across every touchpoint.
careerHighlights: Bridges project engineering details with clear client-facing communication.
Supports marketing and operations with dependable message consistency.
Keeps deliverables organized so teams stay aligned across active missions.
Strengthens trust through responsive coordination and accurate updates.
funFact: Lisa can locate project documentation in seconds and keep communication flowing without delay.
certifications: Microsoft Office Specialist, Customer Service Excellence, Procore Certified
